page_metadata.biotools__summary: Protein Sequence Variability (PVS) is a web server for the prediction of conserved T-cell epitopes. Several variability metrics are used to compute the absolute site variability in multiple protein sequence alignments.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Protein Sequence Variability (PVS) is a web server for the prediction of conserved T-cell epitopes. Several variability metrics are used to compute the absolute site variability in multiple protein sequence alignments.
